description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian with a slim build, standing upright and facing forward. He has spiky, medium-length hair and wears a face mask that covers his nose and mouth. His outfit consists of a short-sleeve t-shirt with a graphic design and flame motif, paired with cropped cargo pants that have a side pocket. He is wearing open-toed flip-flops on his feet, and his arms are relaxed at his sides. The overall appearance suggests a casual, urban style suitable for warm weather.
description: A casually dressed adult male pedestrian with spiky hair, a face mask, a graphic t-shirt, cropped cargo pants, and flip-flops, standing upright.
description_view_0: Front view showing the spiky hairstyle, face mask, graphic t-shirt with flame design, and relaxed arm posture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face mask, the side pocket on the pants, and the flip-flops.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the t-shirt, the flame motif wrapping around, and the cropped pants.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the arm position, the side cargo pocket, and the flip-flops.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve t-shirt and cropped cargo pants with a face mask
